heroRoles: I help businesses grow through modern web, mobile, and digital solutions
site.heroBio:
From idea to launch, I create fast, scalable, and user-friendly digital solutions that help businesses improve their online presence and grow efficiently.
With 4+ years of experience, I’ve helped businesses grow through modern, scalable, and high-performing digital solutions.

about.body_paragraph1: I build software that solves real problems. As a Software Engineer at Vistaar Digital, I lead end-to-end delivery for agency and startup clients owning everything from database design to cloud deployment and client communication.
about.body_paragraph2: What sets me apart is the range. Web, mobile, server infrastructure, and AI I handle every layer without handing off. Outside my full-time role, I have delivered 10+ freelance projects through referrals alone, helping small businesses move from paper-based operations to fully digital systems.
about.body_closing: If you need an engineer who takes full ownership let's talk.

values.title: Full ownership
values.description: I own the entire lifecycle architecture, development, deployment, and delivery.

values.title: Outcome focused
values.description: I speak to clients in results, not technical jargon.

values.title: Referral built
values.description: Every freelance client came through a recommendation no platforms, no pitching.

contact.intro: Have a Laravel build, WordPress project, or a freelance inquiry in mind? Send a short message with your stack and timeline I'll get back to you within a couple of business days.

footer.blurb: Helping businesses grow with modern web, mobile, and AI-driven digital solutions. Building fast, scalable, and user-friendly experiences that drive real results.

testimonials.text: Manish took full ownership of our Laravel API layer and kept the React team consistently unblocked. Releases were on schedule and communication was always clear.
testimonials.name: Priya N.

testimonials.text: Our WooCommerce booking logic had some genuinely tricky edge cases. Manish worked through UAT methodically and turned fixes around quickly no fuss.
testimonials.name: Rahul S.

testimonials.text: Delivered solid WordPress work under a tight government deadline. The chart pipelines were documented clearly enough that the team could take over without any handholding.
testimonials.name: Anita K.

testimonials.text: We brought Manish in on a short contract sprint and he slotted straight into our stand-ups. The CMS work was delivered cleanly and without any last-minute surprises.
testimonials.name: Vikram P.

testimonials.text: Straight-talking estimates and the confidence to push back when a shortcut would have caused problems down the line. That kind of professional maturity is rare.
testimonials.name: Sneha M.

faqs.q: Are you available for freelance work?
faqs.a: Yes. I take on well-scoped freelance projects websites, CMS platforms, mobile apps, and e-commerce builds. Share your requirement and timeline through the contact form and I will get back to you promptly.

faqs.q: Have you led or mentored other developers?
faqs.a: Yes. At Vistaar Digital I conduct interviews for frontend roles and mentor new hires through onboarding. I also manage client accounts directly, bridging technical delivery and business communication.

faqs.q: Do you work with small businesses?
faqs.a: Yes, and it is some of my most rewarding work. Several of my freelance clients were managing their business entirely on paper. I built them digital systems CMS platforms, inventory tools, and mobile apps that replaced that entirely.

faqs.q: What kind of projects do you work on?
faqs.a: Full-stack web applications, mobile apps, e-commerce stores, custom CMS platforms, REST APIs, and cloud deployments. Both agency-scale products and smaller business solutions I have delivered 25+ projects across both.

faqs.q: Do you handle deployment and hosting as well?
faqs.a: Yes. I configure servers, set up cloud infrastructure on AWS, manage SSL and domain setup, and deploy to production. You get a fully live product not just a codebase.

faqs.q: How do you manage client projects?
faqs.a: I work in short cycles with clear milestones and regular updates. Clients always know what has been built, what is next, and what decisions need their input. No surprises on scope or timeline.
